rationale: The plan is implementation-ready on the stated measurement/advisory terms and contains no remaining internal contradiction. It fixes the normative measurement semantics with discriminating executable fixtures, keeps risk classification advisory, establishes a fail-closed authority-to-manifest-to-snapshot chain with appropriately limited claims, gates low-risk classification on root-pinned coverage attestations, accepts the complete closed Clotho vocabulary while measuring only the declared edge subset, and preserves the zero-dependency/read-as-data boundary through a fail-closed source-profile oracle and one explicitly pinned vendor exception. The documentation-first authority triple and minus-id construction avoid circularity. The enrollment flip and associated verify-contracts expectation change remain routed to the separately held Eye ruling and therefore do not block this implementation authorization.
